rows.description: Soluta Bursarius.
rows.notes: Both extractors agreed on no amounts. Description taken from gemini-flash, which correctly reads 'Bursarius' as visually confirmed (gpt-5-mini had 'Bursaris').

rows.description: D. S. d.
rows.notes: Row added as gpt-5-mini missed it. Extracted from gemini-flash, confirmed by visual verification as a clear, albeit faint, column header for currency.

rows.description: Majos Upton pro Decem: Tot: Nat: 1763.
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which is more accurate for 'Majos' and 'Tot:' than gpt-5-mini's 'Megs' and 'Test:' based on visual verification.
rows.english_description: Payment to Majos Upton for December (entry dated 1763).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Majos Upton for December, amounting to £15 16s 9¼d.

rows.description: Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Both extractors agreed on no amounts. Description taken from gemini-flash, which correctly transcribes capitalization ('Soluta Varia.' vs gpt-5-mini's 'soluta varia.'). Confirmed visually.

rows.description: 1763. Novr 15. Pd Vicar of S: Newington to Mich Cast.
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which includes the full date and accurately reads 'Cast.' (gpt-5-mini missed date and had 'last'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to the vicar of South Newington relating to the Michaelmas charge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the vicar of South Newington relating to Michaelmas, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: - 19. Collin Chawder in full of last years Bill
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which includes the date '- 19.' and correctly reads 'Chawder' (gpt-5-mini missed date and had 'Chandler'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Collin Chawder in full settlement of the previous year's bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Collin Chawder in full settlement of the previous year's bill, amounting to £23 15s 6d.

rows.description: Decbr 10. Pd Butler for Guttry Books & paper
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which includes the full date and accurately reads 'Guttry Books & paper' (gpt-5-mini missed date and had 'Batty Booke paper'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Butler for books and paper (Guttry/Guttry item).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Butler for books and paper, amounting to £0 17s 6d.

rows.description: Ditto a Bill of Expences
rows.notes: Description agreed by consensus. Amount for pence column taken from gemini-flash, confirmed by visual verification that the digit is clearly '5', not '6' as gpt-5-mini read.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Butler for a bill of expenses.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Butler for a bill of expenses, amounting to £1 2s 5d.

rows.description: - 12. allowed Mr Howelle Expences in ye Weston affairs
rows.notes: Amount and description from gemini-flash, confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds as '0', pence as '2', and parts of the description ('Howells', 'Merton', 'affair'). Despite gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging ambiguity, gemini-flash's reading is accurate.
rows.english_description: Reimbursement to Mr Howelle for expenses in the Weston affairs.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement to Mr Howelle for expenses in the Weston affairs, amounting to £2 2s 0d.

rows.description: Searler Statton Bill in full to Octr 17. 1761.
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which is visually more accurate for 'Searler Statton' (gpt-5-mini had 'Teasler slater'). gpt-5-mini correctly noted ambiguity for the first name.
rows.english_description: Payment to Searler Statton in full up to 17 October 1761.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Searler Statton in full up to 17 October 1761, amounting to £18 6s 0d.

rows.description: Thompson Joynss Bill in full to July 21. 1762.
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'Joynss' (gpt-5-mini had 'Joynes'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Thompson Joynss in full up to 21 July 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Thompson Joynss in full up to 21 July 1762, amounting to £31 17s 3d.

rows.description: Jaguss Glaries in full to April 1. 1762.
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which is more visually accurate for 'Jaguss Glaries' (gpt-5-mini had 'Jasper Glasier').
rows.english_description: Payment to Jaguss Glaries in full up to 1 April 1762 (supplier name as transcribed).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Jaguss Glaries in full up to 1 April 1762, amounting to £21 11s 0d.

rows.description: - 26. Pd Doe's Bill
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which includes the date '- 26.' (gpt-5-mini missed it). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment of Doe's bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Doe's bill, amounting to £3 1s 10d.

rows.description: 1964. Jany 3. Pd Thompson & Queches for Business abt ye Inclosure.
rows.notes: Amount and description from gemini-flash, confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini provided an incorrect amount (£0 4s 4d) and significantly misread the description ('ye Zuaker for Burning' instead of '& Queches for Business'). gemini-flash correctly noted the '1964' anomaly.
rows.english_description: Payment to Thompson and Queches for business concerning the enclosure.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Thompson and Queches for business concerning the enclosure, amounting to £4 4s 0d.

rows.description: - 28. allowed Mr Sadler Progress Money
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which includes the date '- 28.' and accurately reads 'Mr Sadler Progress Money' (gpt-5-mini missed date and had 'Wm Sadler Propert money'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Allowance of progress money to Mr Sadler for estate progress expenses.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance of progress money to Mr Sadler, amounting to £0 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Full consensus on this total row, including amounts and empty description.

rows.description: Febry 29. Pd Collens Bill on account for Candles
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which correctly reads 'Collens' and capitalisation of 'Candles' (gpt-5-mini had 'Collin' and 'candles'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment on account to Collens for candles.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment on account to Collens for candles, amounting to £13 0s 0d.

rows.description: March 5. Pd Mr Perry Solicitors Bill in yr Merton affairs
rows.notes: Amount and description from gemini-flash, confirmed by visual verification of '6d' in pence column and accurate transcription of names and words (gpt-5-mini misread pence as '0', and had 'Piers' and 'solicitors' and 'affair').
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Perry, solicitor, for costs in the Merton affairs.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Perry, solicitor, for costs in the Merton affairs, amounting to £21 16s 6d.

rows.description: - 22. Thos: Harper for gravelling ye Quadrangle &c
rows.notes: Amount and description from gemini-flash, confirmed by visual verification of '8d' in pence column and the leading '- 22.' for the date (gpt-5-mini misread pence as '3' and missed the leading dash for the date). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Thomas Harper for gravelling the quadrangle and related work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Thomas Harper for gravelling the quadrangle and related work, amounting to £0 6s 8d.

rows.description: April 3. Pd Mres Campione for 2 Buts for ye Hall
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which more accurately reads 'Mres Campione for 2 Buts' (gpt-5-mini had 'Messrs Campion for 2 Butts'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mrs Campione for two butts for the Hall (likely wine barrels).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mrs Campione for two butts for the Hall, amounting to £9 9s 0d.

rows.description: allowed Mr Bush Landtax for Jany 5 ye L. Day
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which is more accurate for 'Jany 5 ye L. Day' (gpt-5-mini had '5 yrs L: day'). gpt-5-mini correctly noted ambiguity in description, but gemini-flash's reading is verified visually.
rows.english_description: Payment allowed to Mr Bush for the land tax due around Lady Day/January 5.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment allowed to Mr Bush for the land tax, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Jackson for printing abt ye Inclosure
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'abt ye Inclosure' (gpt-5-mini had 'act ye enclosure'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Jackson for printing connected with the enclosure.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Jackson for printing connected with the enclosure, amounting to £1 3s 6d.

rows.description: May 23. Pd Plater for Stick Brushes for ye Hall
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'May 23. Pd Plater' (gpt-5-mini had 'may 23 Pd Oster'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Plater for stick brushes for the Hall.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Plater for stick brushes for the Hall, amounting to £0 8s 3d.

rows.description: Quittacksip for 2 Chimney Covers
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'Quittacksip' (gpt-5-mini had 'Millcliff'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment for two chimney covers (supplier name in the original is unclear).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for two chimney covers, amounting to £1 9s 0d.

rows.description: Flout for Madeira Wine for ye Hall
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'Flout' (gpt-5-mini had 'Stout'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Flout for Madeira wine for the Hall.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Flout for Madeira wine for the Hall, amounting to £0 9s 0d.

rows.description: Expences of David Collin Remdr of a Bill
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'Expences' (capitalized) and 'Remdr' (gpt-5-mini had 'expences' and 'Recd'). Confirmed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment of the remainder of a bill to David Collin for expenses.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the remainder of a bill to David Collin for expenses, amounting to £19 17s 2d.
